text:
by the Part D sponsor on the PDE record submitted to 
CMS. 
Historically, this identifier could be an NPI, DEA identification number, UPIN, or state license number. 
After April 2013, it is an NPI. 
SHORT NAME: PRSCRBR_ID_QLFYR_CD 
LONG NAME: PRSCRBR_ID_QLFYR_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
PDE 
VALUES: 
01 = National Provider Identifier (NPI) 
06 = Unique Physician Identification Number (UPIN) 
08 = State license number 
12 = Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA) number 
Null/missing
